title: Recover production always-on match data runtime
required_validation_commands: pnpm exec prisma migrate diff --from-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --to-schema-datamodel prisma/schema.prisma --script
production_validation: Scoped Railway API and Worker deployment only
Worker logs show two cycles with safe heartbeat/error state and no secret/raw payload output
API health source is service/runtime, never mock
Internal worker status is checked with an existing token without printing it
expected_results: Worker has runtime DB and TxLINE references without exposing their values.
Transient provider/DB failures produce safe structured diagnostics and do not terminate the loop.
HealthStatus records starting, cycle, success/no_data/degraded/failure, heartbeat, counts, and safe last error.
Discovery uses configured real competition IDs and dynamic UTC day windows; absent config fails closed.
Public health has an explicit non-mock service envelope.
Prisma diff is empty and migration_applied=false, seed_applied=false.
